## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PhoneOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PhoneOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
call, mute

## Categories
connectivity, devices, communication
